label: positive
description: pnpm project with a .pnpmfile.cjs overrides hook that performs a prototype-pollution pattern (mutating __proto__ on parsed JSON) AND a pnpm.overrides entry that overrides a popular dep. The .pnpmfile.cjs hook is the family-3 prototype-pollution sink; the overrides entry fires L2-PNPM-001 (which is the closest existing rule).
